 /* customize condition logic here, return true or false */
  var featureInput = currentInputs; 
  if (typeof featureInput === "string") {
 featureInput = JSON.parse(featureInput);
    }

sys_update_xml.name: sys_generative_ai_config_9c51fed93b7ccf5875e10964c3e45a1a
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_generative_ai_config"><sys_generative_ai_config action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>false</active><additional_configurations>{"skill_config_id":"a451fed93b7ccf5875e10964c3e45aaf"}</additional_configurations><ai_suggested>false</ai_suggested><definition>1451bed93b7ccf5875e10964c3e45af4</definition><definition_table>sys_one_extend_capability_definition</definition_table><documentation/><max_tokens>500</max_tokens><min_word_count>-1</min_word_count><model>llm_generic_small</model><name>AI-generated prompt</name><parent/><prompt>Generate a comprehensive lead summary in a structured format similar to a business overview.
Structure the summary as follows:
**Overview:** - Lead number: {{lead.number}} - Lead creation date: {{lead.sys_created_on}} - Lead status: {{lead.state}} , Lead score: {{lead.lead_score}} - Company: {{lead.company}} , Contact: {{lead.first_name}} {{lead.last_name}} , Title: {{lead.title}} - Lead source: [lead_source] - Industry: [industry], Annual revenue: [annual_revenue] - Assigned to: [assigned_to]
**Opportunity Information:** - Total opportunity value: {{lead.short_description}} - Expected close date: [expected_close_date] - Probability: [probability] - Related opportunity: {{source_opportunity}}
**Related Quotes (if available):** For each related quote, show: - Quote number, status, total amount - Products/services quoted - Quote creation date and approval status
**Recent Activities:** - Last contact date and method - Key interactions in last 30 days - Number of activities: calls, emails, meetings
**Products/Solutions of Interest:** - List products or services the lead is interested in - Any specific requirements or preferences mentioned
**Next Steps and Recommendations:** - Recommended immediate actions - Potential obstacles or risks - Suggested follow-up timeline
Format this as clear, scannable sections with bullet points. Include "Show more" expandable sections if the summary is long.
End with: "Check AI-generated content for accuracy." </prompt><prompt_template_role>user</prompt_template_role><provider_company/><request_tokens>32018</request_tokens><show_in_prompt_library>false</show_in_prompt_library><state>draft</state><structured_output_enabled>false</structured_output_enabled><structured_output_schema/><sys_class_name>sys_generative_ai_config</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>sisridevi</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-05-11 06:06:30</sys_created_on><sys_customer_update>false</sys_customer_update><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_id>9c51fed93b7ccf5875e10964c3e45a1a</sys_id><sys_mod_count>4</sys_mod_count><sys_name>1451bed93b7ccf5875e10964c3e45af4</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="CPQ Integration" source="sn_cpq_intg">783f7a4e2b4be61001bff246f291bfe8</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_replace_on_upgrade>false</sys_replace_on_upgrade><sys_scope display_value="CPQ Integration">783f7a4e2b4be61001bff246f291bfe8</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_generative_ai_config_9c51fed93b7ccf5875e10964c3e45a1a</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>sisridevi</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-05-11 06:49:57</sys_updated_on><temperature>0.2</temperature><thinking_tokens>0</thinking_tokens><version>1</version></sys_generative_ai_config></record_update>
